settings.warn.http_remote.title.context: Warning dialog title for non-loopback HTTP API configurations

settings.warn.http_remote.body.value:
You configured Lemonade over HTTP to a host that is not loopback. Traffic can be read or modified on the network path. Lemonade does not provide HTTPS itself; use a VPN, SSH tunnel, or a TLS reverse proxy if this endpoint is reachable beyond a single trusted machine.

Choose Save to continue or Cancel to go back.
settings.warn.http_remote.body.context: Warning dialog body for non-loopback HTTP API configurations
